report.summary: Low-delta cycle: HEAD unchanged at 3b2dd28. 79 uncommitted files (+9 from prior v2 report). 4 pages in publish queue (2 Apr 1 + 2 Apr 2). 141 TS errors stable across same 4 files. Day 11 deploy gap persists — longest in project history.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: HEAD unchanged at 3b2dd28 (Apr 1 build fix) — no new commits since last cycle
1,244 page.tsx files on disk (+2 from v2's 1,242: crypto-staking-guide-2026, flash-loans-defi-guide-2026)
632 published slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES (+2 from v2's 630 — uncommitted changes in working tree)

4 pages in PUBLISH_QUEUE: euler-v2-modular-lending (Apr 1), hyperlane-permissionless-interoperability (Apr 1), crypto-staking-guide-2026 (Apr 2), flash-loans-defi-guide-2026 (Apr 2) — all have page.tsx on disk

141 TS errors across 4 files — STABLE: structured-data.examples.ts, lido-v3-stvaults-guide-2026, crypto-arbitrage-strategies-guide-2026, rwa-yield-vs-defi-yield-comparison-2026. Non-blocking (ignoreBuildErrors: true)
109 published slugs still missing page.tsx — long-standing debt, unchanged from v2
10 learn pages + stablecoin-yield-tracker modified in working tree — same set as v2, no new modifications this cycle

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 core API routes present with cache config: prices (60s), trending (300s), fear-greed (600s), market-metrics (60s), market-dominance (300s), defi-yields (300s)
Cache-Control + stale-while-revalidate headers verified on all routes
Rate limiter enforcement: only 2/6 routes (prices, trending) call checkRateLimit() — 4 routes unprotected. Unchanged from prior cycle
Fallback data gap: defi-yields returns 500 on failure with no graceful fallback — persistent P1
Health endpoint exists at /api/health with rate limiting (100 req/min) — operational
Cannot verify live API responses (sandbox egress blocks degen0x.com and upstream API domains)

sections.title: DevOps
items: P0 BLOCKER: Day 11 without production deploy — last batch deploy Mar 25 (21aaf5b), last commit Apr 1 (3b2dd28)
79 uncommitted files in working tree (+9 from v2's 70): 16 modified tracked, 63 untracked
New untracked since v2: incremental report files and social drafts — no new code files
4 OG SVGs still uncommitted: crypto-watchlist, dao-treasury-dashboard, degen-score, omnichain-defi
Build config stable: 8GB memory, standalone output, ignoreBuildErrors=true, concurrency=4
Cannot verify Vercel dashboard or live deployment state from sandbox

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Cycle output: 0 new commits. 2 new learn pages scaffolded since yesterday (crypto-staking, flash-loans) — in working tree only
Publish queue grew from 2 to 4 pages — all ready to promote (page.tsx exists for each)
Carry-over (persistent): 79 uncommitted files, 4 publish queue pages, 109 missing page.tsx slugs, 4/6 API routes unprotected by rate limiter
Time-sensitive content risk: Pectra upgrade ~8 days (Apr 10), tax deadline ~13 days (Apr 15) — guides still undeployed
Blockers for Jefe: (1) Commit+push needed — 79-file backlog is growing, deploy gap now 11 days, (2) Publish queue has 4 pages ready to promote once deployed
